violations.text: The hand sink was in poor repair (not dispensing any water). The hand sinks must be operating properly at all times. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink. Proper sanitizing procedures reviewed with person in charge. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
